name: @mcp-vertex/web
description: Product/documentation site for @mcp-vertex/core, generated from the live tool registry (tools + capabilities.json stay in sync with the code).

scripts.dev: bun run --cwd ../.. docs:api && PAGES_BASE='' astro dev
scripts.build: bun scripts/check-i18n.ts && bun scripts/gen-capabilities.ts && bun scripts/gen-skills.ts && astro build && bun run index:search
scripts.build:strict: bun scripts/check-i18n.ts && bun scripts/gen-capabilities.ts --strict && bun scripts/gen-skills.ts --strict && astro build && bun run index:search
